name: Psychopathy Assessment
short_description: Psychopathy Assessment is a retro-80s V.H.S PS1 style analog horror game that blurs the line between reality and delusion. Step into a universe where you're not just playing a game; you're taking a psychopathy test, but the stakes are considerably higher than a straightforward diagnosis.
detailed_description:
Psychopathy Assessment is a retro V.H.S 80s analog horror experience that blurs the line between gaming and reality. You're not just taking a test; you're taking a psychopathy exam, and the results are far more disturbing than a label.

Presented through an eerie VHS aesthetic, this experience immerses you in a chillingly nostalgic environment. Answer a series of questions designed to probe your deepest thoughts and impulses.

Every choice has consequences, each more unsettling than the last, as the screen flickers and the tape warps under the weight of your decisions.

Are you ready to find out if you're truly a psychopath? Or will the test itself drive you to madness? The only way to know is to press play.

  • Retro 80s Analog Horror: Immerse yourself in a true 80s horror experience complete with VHS aesthetics, spooky noises, and unnerving atmospheres.

  • Psychopathy Test: Respond to a series of frightening and penetrating questions intended to delve into your psyche. Will the results show something sinister, or is this just a game?

  • Dynamic Consequences: Each decision has an impact on the atmosphere and your final ending, guaranteeing that no two playthroughs are identical.

  • Immersive VHS Filter: Play via a distorted lens, complete with realistic VHS effects, tape errors, and visual distortions that worsen as you advance.

  • Psychological Horror: A story that plays with your mind, questioning your perspective of reality and blurring the borders between fiction and truth.

  • Surprise PS1-Style Gameplay: Once the assessment is completed, the game unexpectedly shifts into PS1-style gameplay. It is up to you to decide how the story unfolds.

  • Short, Intense Experience: A spine-chilling excursion that will leave a lasting impression in less than an hour.

Discover a terrifying blend of psychological horror and classic gameplay in which your decisions impact the result, and the story does not finish with the assessment—it is merely the beginning. Play Psychopathy Assessment now.
